data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"47d2-d756","generatedAt":"2026-04-05T22:22:28.583534Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"EAGAIN-aware retry and reclassification in test runner infrastructure","description":"Developers running the DSO test suite locally encounter OS-level resource exhaustion (EAGAIN/errno 35) when parallel test execution saturates process limits.","successCriteria":["Suite-engine _process_completed_test detects EAGAIN patterns and retries with MAX_PARALLEL=1 exported","Record-test-status.sh applies EAGAIN grep as safety net, writes resource_exhaustion","Test gate treats resource_exhaustion as non-blocking at both check points","All parsers handle resource_exhaustion without error","Exit code 254 + EAGAIN stderr both must match","Suite-engine retry result is authoritative","Integration test induces EAGAIN via ulimit -u and verifies full path"]},"stories":[{"id":"ccb7-ce69","title":"As a developer, I get automatic EAGAIN retry when running tests in parallel","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Suite-engine detects EAGAIN in stderr, retries with MAX_PARALLEL=1 exported","Dual-condition: exit 254 + stderr pattern both must match","Retry result passed is authoritative","Unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Dual-condition gate tested independently","[Maintainability] EAGAIN regex shared with 861e-6dee","[Implicit Shared State] resource_exhaustion string literal
